Everything You Need for Better Health

A single platform for all government healthcare services — free, accessible, and available to every Indian citizen.

AI Powered
🧠

AI Disease Tracker

Real-time AI-powered disease surveillance across all states. Monitor outbreaks, get risk alerts, and check symptoms.

Explore →
25,000+ Hospitals
🏥

Hospital Directory

Comprehensive database of 25,000+ government hospitals with beds, specialities, and real-time availability.

Explore →
Free Service
📅

Book Appointment

Zero-queue digital appointment booking at any government hospital. Available 24×7 for all citizens.

Explore →

👤

Health Dashboard

Personal health records, vaccination schedule, prescription history, and family health tracking.

Explore →

Government Health Schemes

Free healthcare benefits you are entitled to as an Indian citizen

View All →
🏥
Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
₹5 lakh health cover for 50 crore citizens
🌿
National Health Mission
Universal access to healthcare across rural India
🏔️
PMJAY Sehat
Extension to J&K residents
🏭
ESI Scheme
Social security for organized sector workers

Book in 3 Simple Steps

Getting healthcare has never been this easy

01

Find Hospital

Search our directory of 25,000+ government hospitals by state, city, or speciality.

02

Choose Doctor & Slot

View available doctors, check their experience, and pick a convenient time slot.

03

Confirm & Visit

Get instant confirmation via SMS. Show your booking ID at the hospital — zero waiting.

📅 Book Your Appointment Now — It's Free
🚨

Medical Emergency? Act Fast.

Our 24×7 ambulance service covers all 36 states and UTs.
